mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Lala M. Hill, Until she reached 21 years of age 12.17.1907
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Lala M. Hill, Until she reached 21 years of age 12.17.1907 W.C. Lester, Guardian Recorded in the Settlement Book, page 406, of the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
